title: Roster item (GET /roster)
description: Composite convenience view: one row per agent handle, a PURE SERVER-SIDE JOIN of fleet (fleet.schema.json) + heartbeats (heartbeat.schema.json) + registry (registry.schema.json) + agents (agent.schema.json) + governance (governance.schema.json) + leases (lease.schema.json) + workers (worker.schema.json) — provided so the Roster surface is ONE read instead of seven. No field is computed beyond the join: every field's staleness window is its SOURCE's window (fleet 90s, registry 90/300s, heartbeat per manager tick, etc.), and a null means that source has no row for the handle, never 'healthy'. Fields joined from a source keep that source's semantics verbatim. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

handle.description: Canonical lowercase agent handle (the join key).

host.description: Machine label, canonical form; from fleet/registry/agents (first non-null wins, sources agree by construction).

status.description: Fleet status (fleet.status); null = no fleet row. offline stays consumer-derived from staleness.

task_id.description: Tracker task currently worked (fleet.task_id / lease join).

task_title.description: Title of task_id, joined from the tracker; null when no task.

heartbeat_state.description: The supervising manager's heartbeat.state; null = no manager heartbeat row.

crash_count.description: From heartbeat.crash_count; null = no heartbeat row.

channel_lock_state.description: From heartbeat.channel_lock.state; null = no lock state reported.

autonomy.description: From the agents registry; null = not in the agents table.

lane.description: From the agents registry; null = not in the agents table.

light.description: Governance traffic light; null = no governance row for the handle.

tokens_spent.description: From governance.tokens_spent; null = no governance row.

lease_expires_at.description: From the agent's active lease (leasePublic); null = no active lease.

fence.description: From the agent's active lease; null = no active lease.

workers_active.description: Count of live worker (subagent) rows owned by this handle.

updated_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — the newest source-row update among the joined sources for this handle.

observed_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when console-api assembled this row (join time; per-row freshness).

fleet_updated_at.description: The FLEET source's own clock — gone-quiet (>90s) derives from THIS, never the merged max.

started_at.description: Fleet started_at — now-playing elapsed derives from this.
